pages.rationale: Gentle bedtime establish — collapsed pillow-cave, readable night bedroom
Leo arrives — intimate medium, no drama angle
Tiny almost-roar beat — close but not scary wide mouth
Blanket-hide mistake — medium holds readable text + body language
